explanation: The user states that the object I am holding (mug_1) is not clean, implying it needs to be cleaned. To clean it, I must pour the liquid into the sink, place it there, turn on the faucet to rinse, turn it off, and then pick it up again to continue with the task. The plan follows standard cleaning procedures for a liquid-filled mug, ensuring the object is properly cleaned and returned to being held.
